title: 10 best herbal creams for hair fall

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Aloe vera's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as aloin and aloe-emodin, help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss by reducing blood flow and damaging follicles.

Antioxidant properties: Aloe vera's antioxidant compounds, including vitamins C and E, beta-carotene, and other phenolic acids, neutralize free radicals that can damage hair follicles and cause hair fall, promoting healthy scalp and hair growth.

Wound-healing and soothing properties: Aloe vera's gel contains acemannan, a complex sugar that promotes wound healing by stimulating collagen synthesis and improving tissue elasticity, which can help soothe an itchy or irritated scalp and promote healthy hair growth.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe vera, also known as aloe, creams helps with hair fall because of its nourishing properties. Rich in vitamins A, C, and E, aloe vera creams promote healthy hair growth by strengthening hair follicles and reducing inflammation. The anti-inflammatory properties of aloe vera creams soothe an itchy scalp, reducing stress that can contribute to hair loss. Additionally, aloe vera creams moisturize the scalp, helping to lock in moisture and promote a healthy environment for hair growth. This results in stronger, healthier hair.
remedy_constituents: Anthraquinones: These compounds help with hair fall by promoting blood circulation to the scalp, reducing inflammation, and preventing oxidative stress, which can contribute to hair loss.
Fatty acids: Fatty acids present in Aloe vera, such as oleic and linoleic acid, help with hair fall by nourishing the scalp, reducing inflammation, and promoting healthy hair growth.

Glycoproteins: Glycoproteins in Aloe vera, such as aloin and aloe-emodin, help with hair fall by reducing inflammation and promoting the growth of new hair by increasing the length of the anagen phase.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The gel extracted from Aloe vera leaves is used to make hair fall creams due to its soothing and nourishing properties, which help to promote hair growth and reduce dandruff.
Stems: The extracts from the stems of Aloe vera help to strengthen hair follicles and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in hair fall creams.
remedy_recipe: Mix 2 tablespoons of aloe vera gel with 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a small bowl.
Add 1 teaspoon of beeswax to the bowl and heat it in a double boiler for 5 minutes.
Remove the bowl from the heat and stir in 1 teaspoon of vitamin e oil and 10 drops of lavender essential oil.
Pour the mixture into a glass jar and let it cool and solidify for 10 minutes.
Store the herbal aloe vera cream in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Inga cream's antioxidant compounds help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation that can contribute to hair loss.

Strengthening Hair Follicles: The creams' natural extracts, such as inositol and other polyphenols, stimulate blood flow to the scalp and strengthen hair follicles, promoting healthy hair growth and preventing excessive shedding.

Anti-Inflammatory Action: Inga cream's anti-inflammatory compounds, including flavonoids and terpenes, help soothe an itchy, irritated scalp and reduce inflammation that can lead to hair loss by reducing the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Inga alba, also known as white inga, creams helps with hair fall because of its rich antioxidant properties and ability to promote hair growth. The herbal extract is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help to nourish and strengthen hair follicles, reducing hair fall and breakage. Additionally, Inga alba creams help to improve blood circulation to the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth, and reducing the risk of hair loss due to stress and other factors. This natural remedy has been traditionally used to promote hair growth and improve scalp health.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These plant-derived compounds help with hair fall by exhibiting antioxidant properties, which reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, promoting a healthy hair growth environment.

Phenolic acids: These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe and calm the scalp, reducing inflammation and promoting hair growth by improving blood circulation and reducing dandruff and itchiness.

Alkaloids: These compounds, such as berberine, found in Inga alba, have antimicrobial properties, which help to prevent fungal infections on the scalp and reduce dandruff, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Inga alba leaves are used to make creams for hair fall because they are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties that promote hair growth.
Seeds: Inga alba seeds are used to make creams for hair fall because they are a rich source of essential fatty acids and proteins that nourish and strengthen hair follicles.
Roots: Inga alba roots are used to make creams for hair fall because they contain bioactive compounds that stimulate hair growth and reduce hair loss.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 200 grams of dried inga alba flowers at peak potency when flowers are in full bloom for 3 hours.
Infuse 200 milliliters of distilled water in a saucepan over low heat with 50 grams of inga alba flowers for 20 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth into a bowl and discard the solids after 10 minutes.
Mix 50 grams of beeswax and 50 grams of shea butter in a double boiler over medium heat for 30 minutes.
Combine the infused liquid with the melted beeswax and shea butter mixture then whip until smooth for 15 minutes.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Ginseng cream's antioxidant properties help to neutralize free radicals that can damage hair follicles and cause hair loss, promoting healthy hair growth.

Stimulatory Effects on Hair Growth: Ginseng contains compounds that stimulate blood flow to the scalp, increasing oxygen and nutrient delivery to hair follicles, which promotes hair growth and strengthens existing hair.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Ginseng cream's anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can cause hair loss by damaging hair follicles and preventing new hair growth.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Panax ginseng, also known as ginseng, creams helps with hair fall because of its potential to stimulate hair growth and improve scalp health. The cream's active compounds, such as ginsenosides and saponins, may help to increase blood flow to the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth. Additionally, ginseng creams may help to reduce stress and promote a balanced hormonal system, both of which can contribute to hair loss. This may help to slow down or even reverse hair fall.
remedy_constituents: Ginsenosides: These triterpenoid saponins are known to stimulate hair growth by increasing the length of the anagen phase, the active growth phase of hair follicles, and promoting the proliferation of hair follicle cells.

Polysaccharides: These complex carbohydrates may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss, and promote a healthy scalp environment conducive to hair growth.

Terpenoids (specifically, sesquiterpenoids): These compounds have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect the hair follicles from damage and promote a healthy scalp environment, ultimately leading to reduced hair fall.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are the primary source of ginsenosides, which are believed to promote hair growth and reduce hair loss.
Leaves: They contain flavonoids, which are thought to improve blood circulation and promote healthy hair growth.
Barks: They are used for their anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce inflammation that can lead to hair loss.
remedy_recipe: Grind 1-2 ounces of dried panax ginseng root into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar.
Mix 1/2 cup of distilled water with 1 tablespoon of glycerin and 1 tablespoon of beeswax in a saucepan.
Add 1-2 teaspoons of the ground ginseng powder to the saucepan and stir continuously over low heat.
Continue heating the mixture for 10-15 minutes or until the beeswax is fully dissolved and the mixture thickens slightly.
Remove the saucepan from heat and allow the mixture to cool before pouring it into a clean glass jar.

remedy_properties: Adaptogenic property: Ashwagandha's adaptogenic property helps to reduce stress and anxiety, which are common causes of hair fall by promoting a healthy scalp environment and reducing cortisol levels.
Anti-inflammatory property: The anti-inflammatory property of Ashwagandha helps to soothe an itchy scalp, reduces redness, and calms irritated skin, thus preventing further hair loss.
Antioxidant property: Ashwagandha's antioxidant property neutralizes free radicals that can damage hair follicles, promote premature graying, and lead to hair fall.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Withania somnifera, also known as ashwagandha, creams helps with hair fall because of its rich antioxidant and adaptogenic properties. The herb promotes hair growth by reducing stress and inflammation in the scalp, which are common causes of hair loss. Ashwagandha creams also stimulate the follicles, increasing blood flow and nourishing the hair roots, leading to thicker and healthier hair. Additionally, it helps to balance the scalp's pH, creating an ideal environment for hair growth, making it an effective remedy for hair fall.
remedy_constituents: Withanolides: Withanolides are a class of steroidal lactones found in Withania somnifera, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These properties may help reduce inflammation in the scalp and promote a healthy hair growth environment.

Withaferin A: Withaferin A is an alkaloid compound isolated from Withania somnifera, known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. It may help prevent hair loss by reducing oxidative stress and promoting hair follicle growth.

Withanoside IV: Withanoside IV is a steroidal glycoside found in Withania somnifera, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. It may help reduce hair loss by reducing inflammation and promoting hair follicle health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Used due to their high concentration of withanolides, which have been shown to promote hair growth and reduce hair fall.
Leaves: Used because they contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to nourish and strengthen hair follicles.
(Optional) Seeds: Not commonly used, but sometimes included due to their potential to stimulate hair growth and improve scalp health through their nutrient content.
remedy_recipe: Harvest withania somnifera roots, drying them in a single layer at room temperature for 2 to 3 weeks.
Grind 500g of dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Steep 200g of the powder in 1 liter of coconut oil over a double boiler for 2 hours.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth and discard the solids, collecting the infused oil.
Blend 100g of the infused oil with 20g of beeswax and 10g of shea butter, heating the mixture until smooth.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Coconut cream with anti-inflammatory herbs like turmeric or ginger can reduce scalp inflammation, which is often a underlying cause of hair loss.

Antioxidant properties: Herbal coconut creams rich in antioxidants from ingredients like rosemary or chamomile can protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy hair growth.

Moisturizing and nourishing properties: Coconut cream with herbs like aloe vera or biotin can deeply moisturize and nourish the hair and scalp, strengthening hair roots and reducing breakage and fall.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Cocos nucifera, also known as coconut, creams helps with hair fall because of its rich nutritional content and bioactive compounds. The cream's high levels of lauric acid, fatty acids, and vitamins promote scalp health and stimulate hair growth. It also has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to calm and soothe the scalp, reducing stress and promoting a healthy environment for hair to grow. Regular use of coconut cream can lead to thicker, fuller hair and a reduction in hair loss.
remedy_constituents: Phenolic Acids: These compounds in coconut oil help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth.
Terpenes (specifically, lauric acid): Lauric acid in coconut oil has antimicrobial properties that prevent scalp infections and promote a balanced scalp ecosystem, reducing hair fall.

Fatty Acids (specifically, oleic acid and linoleic acid): These essential fatty acids in coconut oil nourish and moisturize the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and strengthening hair follicles to reduce hair fall.
remedy_parts: Seeds: The oil extracted from coconut seeds is rich in nutrients and antioxidants, which help to nourish and strengthen hair follicles.
Leaves: Coconut leaf extracts have anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce scalp irritation and promote hair growth.
Fruits: Coconut oil, extracted from the fruit of the Cocos nucifera, has moisturizing and protective properties that can help to soothe and hydrate the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2-3 cocos nucifera fruits and dry them in a warm place for 2-3 weeks to reduce moisture content.
Grind the dried cocos nucifera into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Combine 1 cup of coconut oil with 1 tablespoon of the ground cocos nucifera powder in a heat-proof bowl.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler over low heat for 30 minutes to 1 hour until it reaches a temperature of 120°f.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container and allow it to cool completely.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Neem's antioxidant properties help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to hair loss and promote healthy hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Neem's anti-inflammatory properties reduce redness, swelling, and itching on the scalp, making it an effective remedy for conditions like dandruff, psoriasis, and dermatitis that can lead to hair fall.

Antifungal and antibacterial properties: Neem's antifungal and antibacterial properties help control fungal and bacterial infections on the scalp, which can cause hair loss by damaging the hair follicles and preventing new hair growth.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Azadirachta indica, also known as neem, creams helps with hair fall because it has antifungal and antibacterial properties that reduce scalp irritation and infections that can lead to hair loss. Neem also contains antioxidants that promote hair growth by strengthening hair follicles and preventing damage. Additionally, it improves blood circulation to the scalp, which helps to nourish and rejuvenate hair. This natural remedy has been used for centuries to promote healthy hair growth and reduce hair fall.
remedy_constituents: Azadirachtin: This triterpenoid compound helps reduce hair fall by inhibiting the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair loss.

Quercetin: A flavonoid phenolic compound, quercetin helps reduce hair fall by its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which minimize damage to hair follicles and promote healthy hair growth.

Nimbolide: A sesquiterpenoid compound, nimbolide helps reduce hair fall by its ability to inhibit the 5-alpha-reductase enzyme, which converts testosterone to DHT, and also by its antioxidant properties, which protect hair follicles from damage.
remedy_parts: Seeds: The seeds are the most commonly used part of Azadirachta indica to make creams for hair fall, as they contain a high concentration of neem oil, which has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that help to promote hair growth and prevent hair loss.
Leaves: The leaves are also used to make creams for hair fall, as they contain antioxidants and other compounds that help to nourish the scalp, reduce dandruff, and prevent hair thinning.
Seeds: The seeds are also used due to their oil content which helps in strengthening hair roots and preventing hair fall.
remedy_recipe: Extract the oil from azadirachta indica seeds by cold pressing 1 kg of seeds for 30 minutes.
Mix 100 grams of the extracted oil with 100 grams of coconut oil and 50 grams of beeswax for 10 minutes.
Heat the mixture to 70-80 degrees celsius and stir for 10 minutes to melt the beeswax.
Add 10 grams of vitamin e oil and 10 grams of essential oil of azadirachta indica to the mixture for 5 minutes.
Pour the mixture into a container and let it cool and solidify for 2 hours before use.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Drumstick cream's antioxidant properties help protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in drumstick cream soothe and calm irritated scalps, reducing inflammation that can lead to hair loss and promoting a healthy scalp environment for hair growth.

Stimulating Hair Growth Hormones: The herbal extract in drumstick cream is believed to stimulate the production of hormones that promote hair growth, such as testosterone and dihydrotestosterone (DHT), which helps to strengthen and thicken existing hair.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Moringa oleifera, also known as drumstick, creams helps with hair fall because of its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The cream's high concentration of vitamins and minerals, such as vitamin A, C, and E, and zinc, helps to nourish and strengthen hair follicles. Additionally, the cream's anti-androgen properties help to reduce DHT levels, which is a hormone that contributes to hair loss. This makes it an effective natural remedy for promoting hair growth and reducing hair fall.
remedy_constituents: Isorhapontigenin (IRP): IRP is a flavonoid that has been shown to inhibit the activity of 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme responsible for converting testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair loss.

Quercetin: Quercetin is a flavonoid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth.

Zeatin: Zeatin is a plant growth regulator that has been shown to stimulate hair growth by increasing the length of the anagen phase, the active growth phase of hair follicles, and promoting the formation of new hair follicles.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves are rich in antioxidants and nutrients, making them a popular choice for hair fall creams due to their potential to promote hair growth and reduce inflammation.
Seeds: The seeds are a good source of omega-3 fatty acids and antioxidants, which can help to nourish and protect the hair follicles, reducing hair fall and promoting healthy hair growth.
Roots: The roots of Moringa oleifera contain anti-inflammatory compounds that can help to soothe and calm the scalp, reducing irritation and promoting a healthy environment for hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Gather 1 cup of moringa oleifera leaves, 2 tablespoons of coconut oil, and 1 teaspoon of beeswax.
Steam the moringa oleifera leaves for 10 minutes to release their active compounds, then let them cool.
Mix the cooled moringa oleifera leaves with 1/4 cup of distilled water and 1 tablespoon of aloe vera gel.
Combine the moringa oleifera mixture with 2 tablespoons of coconut oil, 1 teaspoon of beeswax, and 1 teaspoon of vitamin e oil.
Whip the mixture for 5 minutes and pour it into containers, then refrigerate for 30 minutes before serving.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Henna's antioxidant properties help to protect the scalp from free radical damage, reducing oxidative stress that can contribute to hair loss.

Stimulates Blood Flow: The anti-inflammatory and vasodilatory properties of henna help to increase blood flow to the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth by delivering essential nutrients and oxygen.

Antibacterial and Antifungal Properties: Henna's antibacterial and antifungal properties help to control fungal and bacterial infections on the scalp that can cause hair loss, such as dandruff, ringworm, and other scalp irritations.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lawsonia inermis, also known as henna, creams helps with hair fall because of its rich antioxidant properties and ability to nourish the hair follicles. The cream's astringent and antifungal properties help to balance the scalp's pH, reducing inflammation and preventing conditions that lead to hair loss. Additionally, henna's natural oils and pigments help to strengthen hair roots, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing the risk of hair fall. Regular use of Lawsonia inermis creams can lead to thicker, fuller, and healthier-looking hair.
remedy_constituents: Gallic Acid: A polyphenolic compound that helps reduce hair fall by inhibiting the 5-alpha-reductase enzyme, which slows down hair growth, and also has antioxidant properties to protect the hair follicles from damage.

Ellagic Acid: A phenolic compound that exhibits antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help prevent hair loss by reducing oxidative stress, inflammation, and infections in the scalp.

Lawsonin: An alkaloid compound that may help stimulate hair growth by promoting the lengthening of hair follicles and increasing the number of hair follicles, which can lead to a reduction in hair fall.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used to make creams for hair fall due to their potential antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
Seeds: Lawsonia seeds are used to make creams for hair fall due to their possible anti-hair loss and scalp soothing effects.
Roots: The roots of Lawsonia inermis are used to make creams for hair fall due to their potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
remedy_recipe: Extract 50g of dried lawsonia inermis leaves by infusing them in 500ml of cold-pressed coconut oil for 2 weeks.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth into a clean glass container to remove the herbal particles.
Melt 100g of shea butter in a double boiler and let it cool to a temperature of 40°c.
Combine the infused oil with 100g of beeswax and 50g of candelilla wax in a heat-resistant mixing bowl.
Whip the cooled shea butter with 50g of vitamin e oil and 10g of essential oil until it becomes light and fluffy.

remedy_properties: Cicatrizant: Rosemary's cicatrizant property helps to promote tissue repair and reduce inflammation, which can aid in preventing further hair loss and promoting healthy hair growth.
Anti-inflammatory: Rosemary's anti-inflammatory properties can help to soothe and calm the scalp, reducing redness and irritation that may contribute to hair fall.
Antioxidant: Rosemary's antioxidant properties help to protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, which can lead to premature aging and hair loss.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosmarinus officinalis, also known as rosemary, creams helps with hair fall because of its unique blend of essential oils that stimulate blood circulation to the scalp. This increased blood flow promotes hair growth by nourishing the hair follicles and reducing dandruff. The anti-inflammatory properties in rosemary creams also help to soothe an itchy scalp, creating an ideal environment for hair growth. Additionally, rosemary's antioxidant properties help to protect the hair from damage, resulting in healthier and thicker hair.
remedy_constituents: Rosmarinic acid: A phenolic compound that helps reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth.

Carnosic acid: A phenolic diterpene that has been shown to inhibit the 5-alpha-reductase enzyme, which is responsible for converting testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair loss.
Caryophyllene oxide: A sesquiterpene with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help reduce hair loss by protecting the scalp from damage and promoting the growth of new hair.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in antioxidants and essential oils, such as rosmarinic acid and camphor, which help to stimulate hair growth and reduce hair fall.
Stems: Contain rosmarinic acid and other compounds that help to improve blood circulation to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing hair loss.
Seeds: Rich in antioxidants and fatty acids, which help to nourish the scalp, reduce inflammation, and promote hair growth, thereby preventing hair fall.
remedy_recipe: Gather 1/4 cup of fresh rosmarinus officinalis leaves and 1/2 cup of distilled water to extract the herbs.
Steep the rosmarinus officinalis leaves in boiling water for 10 to 15 minutes to release the oils.
Strain the liquid and combine it with 1/4 cup of beeswax and 1/2 cup of shea butter to thicken the mixture.
Blend the mixture until it reaches a smooth consistency and add 1 tablespoon of vitamin e oil for antioxidant properties.
Pour the mixture into a glass jar and let it cool and solidify for about 30 minutes before use.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Thyme's antioxidants help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to hair loss by reducing inflammation and promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Thyme's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce redness and swelling on the scalp, which can alleviate conditions like dandruff, psoriasis, and eczema that can cause hair fall.

Antimicrobial properties: Thyme's antimicrobial agents help kill bacteria and fungi that can infect the scalp and lead to hair loss, such as ringworm and other fungal infections that can cause bald patches.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thymus vulgaris, also known as thyme, creams helps with hair fall because of its rich antioxidant and antifungal properties. The thymol present in thyme stimulates blood circulation to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. It also reduces inflammation and soothes an itchy scalp, creating a conducive environment for hair growth. Additionally, thyme's antifungal properties help control dandruff and other scalp issues, contributing to a reduction in hair fall. This natural remedy provides a holistic approach to hair care and maintenance.
remedy_constituents: Caryophyllene oxide: This sesquiterpene helps with hair fall by reducing inflammation in the scalp, which is often associated with hair loss conditions like androgenetic alopecia.

Thymol: A phenolic compound, thymol exhibits antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals and infections, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth.

Bornyl acetate: This monoterpenoid ester has been shown to inhibit the 5-alpha-reductase enzyme, which is involved in the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair loss in conditions like androgenetic alopecia.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used due to their high concentration of thymol, a compound with antimicrobial and antioxidant properties that promote hair growth and reduce fall.
Roots: Utilized for their rich content of essential oils, including thymol and carvacrol, which help to stimulate hair follicles and prevent hair loss.
Stems: Employed for their high concentration of antioxidants, which help to protect the scalp from damage, reduce oxidative stress, and promote a healthy hair growth environment.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30g of dried thymus vulgaris flowers and leaves from a pesticide-free area.
Combine the dried herb with 50g of beeswax and 50g of coconut oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 10-15 minutes or until the beeswax has fully dissolved.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth into a clean mixing bowl and discard the solids.
Add 20 drops of vitamin e oil and 5g of aloe vera gel to the mixture and stir well.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage creams helps with hair fall because of its remarkable ability to promote healthy scalp circulation, reduce inflammation, and nourish the follicles. The antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties in sage cream help to calm irritated scalps, allowing hair growth to flourish. Additionally, sage cream's moisturizing benefits hydrate the hair shaft, reducing breakage and frizz while promoting a healthy, shiny appearance. As a result, hair fall is significantly reduced, leading to thicker, fuller locks.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Sage's antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress on the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss by protecting the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Sage's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce inflammation on the scalp, which can cause hair loss by blocking the blood flow to the hair follicles and reducing the growth cycle of hair.

Cicatrizant and Wound Healing Properties: Sage's cicatrizant properties promote wound healing and tissue regeneration, which can help stimulate hair growth by promoting the proliferation of hair cells and improving scalp health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sage roots are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help soothe an itchy scalp and promote healthy hair growth.
Leaves: Sage leaves contain camphor, a natural oil that stimulates blood flow to the scalp, reducing dandruff and promoting hair follicle health.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh salvia officinalis leaves in the morning after dew has dried.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm and well-ventilated area for 7 days.
Grind 20 grams of dried salvia officinalis leaves into fine powder using mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered salvia with 100 milliliters of coconut oil and heat gently at low temperature.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or muslin cloth to remove any impurities.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree creams helps with hair fall because they contain a rich blend of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that nourish and revitalize the scalp. The cream's active ingredients stimulate blood flow, promoting healthy hair growth by strengthening hair follicles and thickening strands. Additionally, maidenhair tree extract has been shown to inhibit the formation of DHT, a hormone responsible for hair loss. By tackling these underlying causes of hair fall, maidenhair tree creams provide a natural solution for promoting a full and luscious head of hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Ginkgo biloba's antioxidant properties help protect the scalp and hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-Inflammatory Effects: The cream's anti-inflammatory properties soothe an itchy scalp, reduce redness and irritation, and help alleviate conditions like dandruff and psoriasis that can contribute to hair loss.

Stimulating Blood Flow: Ginkgo biloba's vasodilatory effects improve blood circulation to the scalp, increasing oxygen and nutrient delivery to the hair follicles, promoting healthy growth and reducing the risk of hair loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the maidenhair tree contain natural antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to promote healthy scalp and reduce dandruff, contributing to a reduction in hair fall.

Barks: The barks of the maidenhair tree have been traditionally used to treat hair-related issues such as premature graying, balding, and thinning, due to its ability to stimulate blood flow and promote collagen production.
remedy_recipe: Grind 250 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves into fine powder using a mortar and pestle for about 30 minutes.
Mix the powdered ginkgo biloba with 100 grams of coconut oil in a heat-resistant mixing bowl.
Add 50 grams of beeswax to the mixture and stir until it is fully incorporated and melted over low heat for 10-15 minutes.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool to room temperature before whipping it into a creamy consistency using an electric mixer for about 5 minutes.
Transfer the herbal cream to an airtight container and store it in the refrigerator for up to 6 months or use immediately after preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Asiatic pennywort creams helps with hair fall because of its potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herb is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins that nourish the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth by increasing blood circulation and reducing oxidative stress. It also inhibits the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone responsible for hair loss, thereby strengthening hair follicles and preventing further damage. As a result, Asiatic pennywort creams can help reduce excessive shedding, promote thicker, fuller hair, and even stimulate hair regrowth.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Asiatic Pennywort contains antioxidants that neutralize free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss.
Anti-inflammatory Properties: The cream's anti-inflammatory compounds help soothe and calm irritated scalps, reducing redness and swelling, and promoting a healthy environment for hair growth.

Stimulant Properties: Asiatic Pennywort stimulates blood circulation, increasing oxygen and nutrient supply to the scalp, which can help promote thicker, stronger hair growth by nourishing individual follicles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, roots are believed to promote hair growth and strengthen hair follicles.
Rhyzomes: With their high concentration of starch and mucilage, rhyzomes help to moisturize and nourish the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Measure and mix 20 grams of beeswax, 10 grams of coconut oil, and 10 grams of olive oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture until the beeswax melts completely and the temperature reaches 65 degrees celsius over 15 minutes.
Add 5 grams of dried centella asiatica leaves to the mixture and stir well for 5 minutes before removing from heat.
Allow the mixture to cool down to 50 degrees celsius and then whip it with a spatula until it thickens and emulsifies over 10 minutes.
Transfer the cream to sterilized containers and store them in the refrigerator at 5-8 degrees celsius for up to 6 months after preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric creams helps with hair fall because they contain curcumin, a potent antioxidant that promotes healthy scalp function. Curcumin reduces inflammation in the scalp, which can cause hair loss by blocking the growth of new hairs. Additionally, it stimulates blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing dandruff and itchiness. By nourishing and protecting the scalp, turmeric creams create a favorable environment for hair growth, leading to thicker, fuller, and healthier-looking locks.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Turmeric's active compound, curcumin, helps reduce inflammation on the scalp, which is a common underlying cause of hair loss.
Antioxidant properties: Curcumin and other antioxidants in turmeric cream help neutralize free radicals that can damage hair follicles and lead to hair fall.
Wound-healing properties: Turmeric's anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties also promote wound healing, which is essential for repairing damaged scalp tissue and promoting healthy hair growth.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in curcumin, the rhizome of turmeric has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help promote hair growth and reduce dandruff.
Roots: Turmeric roots contain a significant amount of turmerone, a sesquiterpene that helps to stimulate hair follicles and improve scalp health.
remedy_recipe: Extract 10 grams of dried turmeric powder using 100 milliliters of coconut oil for 2 hours under warm sunlight.
Heat the extracted mixture in a double boiler at low heat for 30 minutes until it reaches a temperature of 70 degrees celsius.
Add 20 grams of beeswax and 10 grams of shea butter to the heated mixture, stirring until they melt completely after 5 minutes.
Allow the mixture to cool and solidify at room temperature for 30 minutes before whipping it with an electric mixer for 2 minutes.
Fill sterilized containers with the final product, labeling each container with the preparation date and storing it in the refrigerator for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Grape creams helps with hair fall because they nourish the scalp and strengthen the roots, promoting healthy hair growth. The antioxidants present in herbal grape extracts stimulate blood circulation to the scalp, which enhances follicle production and reduces shedding. Additionally, grape creams rich in vitamins A, C, and E help to repair damaged hair and prevent split ends, leading to thicker and fuller locks. By targeting both the root cause of hair fall and the visible signs of damage, herbal grape creams provide a holistic solution for healthy, luscious hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Grape seed extracts contain powerful antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, which can damage hair follicles and contribute to hair loss.

Stimulating blood circulation: Herbal grape creams containing ingredients like ginseng and rosemary oil can stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth by delivering essential nutrients and oxygen to hair follicles.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The antioxidants and polyphenols present in herbal grape creams can help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which is a common underlying cause of hair loss conditions such as alopecia areata.
remedy_parts: Roots: Grape roots are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help promote hair growth and reduce inflammation in the scalp.
Barks: The barks of the grape plant contain phenolic compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties, helping to soothe an itchy scalp and prevent hair loss.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry 20 grams of fresh vitis vinifera leaves for one week in shade.
Combine the dried leaves with 10 milliliters of sweet almond oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at 60 degrees celsius for 30 minutes while stirring occasionally.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth and combine it with 5 grams of beeswax and 5 milliliters of coconut oil.
Pour the mixture into sterilized containers and let it cool before storing in airtight containers at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Saw palmetto creams helps with hair fall because they contain a unique compound that blocks the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair loss. By reducing DHT levels, saw palmetto cream may help prevent hair follicles from shrinking and eventually falling out. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties can help soothe an itchy scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and strengthening the roots of existing hairs.
remedy_properties: 5-alpha-reductase inhibition: Saw palmetto cream's ability to inhibit the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT) helps reduce DHT-related hair follicle shrinkage, leading to reduced hair fall.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Saw palmetto's anti-inflammatory effects help soothe and calm the scalp, reducing inflammation and irritation that can contribute to hair loss and promote healthy hair growth.

Antioxidant activity: Saw palmetto's antioxidant properties help protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a healthy hair growth environment and reducing oxidative stress that can lead to hair loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in fatty acids and sterols, which help nourish and strengthen hair follicles, reducing the risk of hair loss.
Barks: Containing bioactive compounds like lupeol and ß-sitosterol, which have anti-inflammatory properties that promote healthy scalp conditions for better hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of dried serenoa repens leaves and stems from a reputable source.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 3 minutes.
Combine the powder with 100ml of cold-pressed coconut oil and stir until well-mixed.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler at 60°c for 30 minutes, then strain through cheesecloth.
Pour the infused oil into glass jars and store in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemongrass creams helps with hair fall because of its unique combination of antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The citral content in lemongrass oil promotes blood circulation to the scalp, reducing dandruff and itchiness that can contribute to hair loss. Additionally, lemongrass's natural astringent properties help to purify the scalp and reduce product buildup, allowing for healthy hair growth. By nourishing the scalp and promoting a healthy environment, lemongrass creams can help to stimulate hair growth and reduce fall.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lemongrass cream's antioxidant properties help combat oxidative stress, which can damage hair follicles and contribute to hair loss, by neutralizing free radicals and reducing inflammation.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in lemongrass cream reduce redness, swelling, and irritation on the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth and preventing further hair loss.

Antifungal and antibacterial properties: Lemongrass cream's antifungal and antibacterial properties help control infections caused by fungal or bacterial overgrowth on the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss and promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and antimicrobial properties, lemongrass roots help to promote hair growth by reducing inflammation and preventing damage.
Rhyzomes: Lemongrass rhyzomes contain oils that stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing dandruff.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of fresh cymbopogon citratus leaves from the market or cultivate them in your garden.
Dry the harvested leaves in shade for 7-10 days, stirring occasionally, until they become crumbly and brittle.
Blend 50g of dried cymbopogon citratus leaves with 20g of coconut oil in a grinder for 30 seconds, until well combined.
Heat the blended mixture in a double boiler at 60°c for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, to extract essential oils and fatty acids.
Strain the hot mixture through a cheesecloth into a clean glass container, discarding solids, and let it cool before storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold creams helps with hair fall because of its unique combination of antioxidants, flavonoids, and polyphenols that stimulate blood flow to the scalp. This increased circulation promotes healthy hair growth by nourishing the follicles and strengthening the roots. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of pot marigold cream soothe an itchy scalp, reducing tension and stress that can contribute to hair loss. As a result, regular use of these creams can help to stimulate hair growth, reduce breakage, and promote a fuller, healthier head of hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Pot marigold's antioxidant properties help to neutralize free radicals that can damage the scalp and cause hair loss, promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in pot marigold cream reduce redness, swelling, and irritation on the scalp, which can contribute to hair fall by creating an environment conducive to hair growth.

Wound-healing and cicatricial properties: Pot marigold's wound-healing and cicatricial properties help to repair damaged hair follicles and promote collagen synthesis, which can help to strengthen hair roots and prevent further hair loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants, pot marigold roots help reduce oxidative stress and promote healthy scalp conditions.
Seeds: High in fatty acids, pot marigold seeds nourish and moisturize the scalp, promoting strong and healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry calendula flowers by air drying or dehydrating for at least 24 hours to preserve their bioactive compounds.
Grind 100 grams of dried calendula flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Combine the ground calendula powder with 50 milliliters of sweet almond oil and 20 grams of beeswax in a double boiler setup.
Heat the mixture over low heat for approximately 30 minutes or until the wax is fully melted and the mixture reaches a temperature of around 180 degrees fahrenheit.
Pour the cream into sterilized glass containers and let it cool and solidify at room temperature before storage.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for hair fall are natural topical treatments that utilize plant extracts to promote hair growth and reduce shedding. These creams typically contain ingredients like saw palmetto, biotin, and aloe vera, which help to nourish and strengthen hair follicles. Examples of herbal creams for hair fall include Biotique Bio Bhringo Amma Hair Growth Stimulator and Kesh King Ayurvedic Hair Oil. By using these creams, individuals can experience thicker, fuller hair and improved self-confidence.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hair fall that are treated with herbal creams are eczema, acne, and skin irritation. Herbal creams containing natural ingredients like aloe vera, tea tree oil, and chamomile can help soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting healthy skin growth. These creams can also be used to treat minor cuts and burns, as well as conditions such as psoriasis and rosacea.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal creams that help with hair fall is a blend of Bhringaraj, Amla, and Neem. Bhringaraj stimulates hair growth, while Amla promotes hair strengthening and reduces breakage. Neem, with its antibacterial properties, helps control scalp infections that contribute to hair loss. When used together, these creams create a powerful formula that nourishes the scalp, stimulates hair growth, and prevents further hair fall. This combination can be applied to the scalp and left on for 30 minutes to an hour before shampooing.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by Journal of ethnopharmacology, alopecia is a hair disorder that can add a significant medical and psychological burden to patients. The study conducted a review of experimental studies related to alopecia, screening previously documented combinations of herbs claimed to be effective based on the herbs and their constituent compounds used in the identified studies. The study found that certain herbs, such as Angelica, Rehmannia glutinosa, Ligusticum chuanxiong hort, and Radix Rehmanniae, showed a high association with vascular drugs and were found to be effective in treating alopecia, suggesting that herbal creams containing these herbs may be beneficial for hair fall.
